subject: Correct distribution addresses of SDC artifact
commit_message:
Correct distribution addresses of SDC artifact

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1036
Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I3c1d23417f721dd50ed2255dfdf3ee83e7d11fa7

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Please note I've separated this review from the following, because I don't actually use starlingx/windriver multicloud endpoints, but only "k8s" one, and there I could verify the change to check if it works, but in this scope I can't say for sure (however, it should work looking at code change required)
